title: Property Consultant - Embassy Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Embassy Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
